name: YNX Wallet
title: YNX Wallet — Web4 identity and Testnet signing
metaDescription: A self-custody Testnet wallet for YNX identity, product-scoped sessions, exact transaction review, revocation and recovery.
h1: Your YNX identity and signing root
risks: Testnet assets have no real-world value

Smart Account and capital candidates are not centrally deployed
structuredDataSuggestion: SoftwareApplication with operatingSystem, softwareVersion, downloadUrl and explicit Testnet engineering-preview status
